PacketLossReport.Keywords: Reset happened --> Sensor Reset Scan Index Drop --> Scan Index Drops ChecksumError --> In case of checksum failure CRC mismatch --> In case of CRC mismatch chunks lost --> Chunk Loss Received duplicate F360 --> Received duplicate F360 internal data chunk with wrong data duplicate cal_source -->when duplicate cal source is observed OVERRUN_FAIL , Timingoverruns -- > When timing overrun happens No data available in the log Asynchronous_Bit PACKET_LOSS_FAIL MissedScanIndexCount
